infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Tryber uses your location to find and create groups near you.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: Tryber uses your location in the background to alert you when a group opens nearby.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Tryber uses your location to find nearby groups.
plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Tryber uses your location to find nearby groups.
